text: Helios says it declined to give an irrevocable undertaking to StoneX's indicative offer, making it "not deliverable".
PUSU Deadline extended to 17 April 2026. Talks with Advent are ongoing.
New addition: formal sale process inviting expressions of interest. Not in discussions with any potential bidder and no price.
Scheme document published - vote scheduled for 22 April 2026.
